name: Data Product Trigger
description: Trigger an enrichment workflow from an upstream data product's event stream. Reads the referenced data product's bound queue and forwards each event to the downstream transform.
use_cases: Source an enrichment/transform workflow from an existing data product
Build staging/derived data products that read another data product's stream
Compose a data mesh: one data product feeds another via transforms

entity.name: Data Product Trigger
entity.description: Reads an upstream data product's bound queue and forwards events to the downstream transform chain.

source_data_product_id.description: Name or UUID of the upstream data product whose bound queue (its terminal/output queue) is the source of events for this enrichment workflow.

placeholders.{{SOURCE_DATA_PRODUCT_ID}}: Name or UUID of the upstream data product to read from
